title: Random Colored Slimes
description: This texture pack just add color variation to vanilla Slime, Optifine is required.
body:
Random Colored Slimes

by .alinoethebunny

This texture pack add multiple color variation for Slime texture... Arround 45 for the last update (3/07/2023) and 24 for previous version...

A rainbow animated slime is avaliable on 1.12.2, due to technical issue with 1.13+, this texture don't work anymore, it's seems to be a optifine bug I can't do anything...

How it work?

Simple, you install the texture pack (ignore the warning if you using the 1.13+ version) then go on your game, slime will be randomly colored.
It's only cosmetic, color of a slime don't have any impact on the gameplay. Screenshot: ![Screenshot 1.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wjeLmUvR/images/08f95009fbd9f77a5ab4044f5b39bf1f601262b1.png) Optifine is required with random texture ON
